title: rhus lanceolata
intro: Rhus lanceolata, also known as Lanceleaf sumac, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its tannins and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhus lanceolata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rhus lanceolata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
